The '''New Republic Military Police''' was a branch of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|armed forces]] which were [[Military Police|charged with ensuring]] that members of the military acted within the laws established by the Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}
